summary: 今日AI研究聚焦于三大方向：医疗健康领域，如罕见病自动表型分析与儿童肥胖多因素建模；大模型能力提升，涵盖工具调用、记忆持久性及推理优化；以及人机交互与评估范式革新，如隐性智能测评与面试人格模拟框架。体现从基础建模到落地应用的深度拓展。

news.title: Multilevel Determinants of Overweight and Obesity Among U.S. Children Aged 10-17: Comparative Evaluation of Statistical and Machine Learning Approaches Using the 2021 National Survey of Children's Health
news.comment: 高规格流行病学研究，对比多种AI建模方法预测青少年肥胖，兼具学术价值与政策参考意义。

news.title: An artificial intelligence framework for end-to-end rare disease phenotyping from clinical notes using large language models
news.comment: 首个端到端罕见病表型注释框架，整合LLM提取、HPO标准化与诊断优先级排序，具实用价值

news.title: DMCD: Semantic-Statistical Framework for Causal Discovery
news.comment: LLM+统计因果发现框架，融合语义先验与验证，实证表现优异，具实用潜力。

news.title: Diffusion Modulation via Environment Mechanism Modeling for Planning
news.comment: 提出DMEMM框架，将环境机制建模引入扩散规划，解决RL轨迹一致性问题，具实用价值

news.title: Implicit Intelligence -- Evaluating Agents on What Users Don't Say
news.comment: 提出Implicit Intelligence框架，聚焦隐性需求推理，填补当前Agent评估空白，具实用价值

news.title: Learning to Rewrite Tool Descriptions for Reliable LLM-Agent Tool Use
news.comment: 提出Trace-Free+框架解决工具描述优化难题，兼顾可扩展性与实用性，是LLM-Agent关键基础设施突破。

news.title: Talking to Yourself: Defying Forgetting in Large Language Models
news.comment: 轻量级自增强方法有效缓解大模型灾难性遗忘，兼顾性能与实用性

news.title: Benchmarking Distilled Language Models: Performance and Efficiency in Resource-Constrained Settings
news.comment: 知识蒸馏性能-计算比显著优化，8B模型效率超训练原版2000倍，具实用价值

news.title: ConceptRM: The Quest to Mitigate Alert Fatigue through Consensus-Based Purity-Driven Data Cleaning for Reflection Modelling
news.comment: 高价值论文提出Consensus-Based Purity-Driven方法解决反射模型训练中的噪声问题，实用性强且具工程推广价值。

news.title: InterviewSim: A Scalable Framework for Interview-Grounded Personality Simulation
news.comment: 大规模面试数据驱动人格模拟框架，填补评估空白，具实用价值
